_doc: ERD layout configuration — edit to control schema diagram grouping.
Clusters: tables matching '{name}' or '{name}_*' are grouped together.
Lidar subgroups: fine-grained layout within LIDAR (full mode only).
Layout overrides: fine-tune the graph to reduce edge crossings.
Run `make schema-erd-report` for a crossing analysis with suggestions.
See group-dot.py docstring for layout mode details.
rank_hints: groups of tables forced to the same Graphviz rank.
edge_weight_overrides: 'child -> parent' keys with integer weights.
Higher weight = shorter, more vertical edge.
invisible_edges: alignment edges added between tables (not rendered).
Keys are cluster names; values map level number (string) to table list.
For LIDAR subgroups, use dotted keys: 'lidar.tracks', 'lidar.analysis_runs', etc.
The plain 'lidar' key applies only to the crossing report, not the full layout.
graph_attributes: Graphviz graph-level attributes (ranksep, nodesep, ratio, etc).
